name: Chocolate Mocha Meringue Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Scald 2 1/2 cups of the milk in a double boiler over low heat, stirring constantly.
2. Add the chocolate and coffee powder to the scalded milk.
3. In a small bowl, combine the flour and remaining milk until smooth. Add the sugar and salt.
4. Stir this mixture into the chocolate mixture in the double boiler.
5. Cook, stirring constantly, for 15 minutes.
6. Stir a small amount of the hot mixture into the egg yolks, then stir the egg yolk mixture back into the chocolate mixture.
7. Continue cooking, stirring, for 8 more minutes or until thickened and smooth.
8. Add the butter and remove from heat. Beat with a wooden spoon until thick.
9. Stir in the vanilla extract.
10. Cool completely.
11. Pour into the prepared pie shell.
12. Cover with Basic Meringue mixture, sealing the edge.
13. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes or until lightly browned.
14. Chill thoroughly before serving.
Garnish with grated chocolate. The pastry can be refrigerated overnight and will remain crisp.
